title: Frequently Asked Questions
description: Public FAQ focused on transparency and conflict prevention.

items.question: Is this a financial product?
items.answer: No. It is a private business investment.

items.question: Is it regulated by the CNMV?
items.answer: No. It does not constitute a public offering of securities.

items.question: Is profitability guaranteed?
items.answer: No. There are no guarantees of returns or capital repayment.

items.question: Can I lose my money?
items.answer: Yes. There is a risk of total or partial loss.

items.question: Can I withdraw my investment at any time?
items.answer: No. There is no immediate liquidity or redemption right.

items.question: Do I receive shares or equity?
items.answer: Not for investments from €100. Only economic rights are acquired.

items.question: Can I sell my investment?
items.answer: Not freely. There is no secondary market.

items.question: What law applies?
items.answer: The investment is governed by Spanish law and Spanish courts.
